prompt: A realistic indoor portrait of {argument name="subject" default="Elon Musk"} standing at a traditional Chinese writing desk, practicing brush calligraphy on a large sheet of rice paper. He wears a black Tang-style Chinese jacket with frog-button closures and subtle embroidered texture, leaning slightly forward with one hand resting on the table and the other holding a calligraphy brush vertically over the paper. The scene is a warm, elegant scholar's studio with dark wooden furniture, a carved brush stand holding exactly 4 hanging calligraphy brushes on the left, an ink stone and small ink containers in the lower-left foreground, and a small ceramic vase on a side table in the back. Behind him are exactly 2 vertical hanging scrolls: the left scroll prominently displays the large characters {argument name="left scroll text" default="满江红"}, and the right scroll contains a longer column of Chinese calligraphy. A wooden lattice window appears on the right side, letting in soft ambient light. The paper on the desk is filled with many lines of black Chinese calligraphy in flowing semi-cursive script, suggesting he is writing {argument name="written poem" default="《满江红》"}. Use a documentary-style, photorealistic aesthetic with cinematic warm lighting, rich wood tones, authentic calligraphy tools, shallow depth of field, waist-up composition, and a serious, focused atmosphere.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实的室内肖像，画面中 {argument name="subject" default="Elon Musk"} 正站在一张传统中式书桌前，在大幅宣纸上练习毛笔书法。他身穿一件带有盘扣和精致刺绣纹理的黑色唐装，身体微微前倾，一只手撑在桌面上，另一只手垂直握着毛笔悬于纸上。场景是一间温暖优雅的学者书房，配有深色木质家具；左侧摆放着一个雕花笔架，上面悬挂着 4 支毛笔；左前方设有砚台和小型墨盒；后方的边桌上摆放着一个小瓷瓶。他身后悬挂着 2 幅垂直卷轴：左侧卷轴醒目地展示着大字 {argument name="left scroll text" default="满江红"}，右侧卷轴则写有一长列中国书法。右侧是一扇木质格栅窗，透进柔和的环境光。桌上的纸张写满了行云流水的半草书体黑色书法，暗示他正在书写 {argument name="written poem" default="《满江红》"}。采用纪录片风格、照片级真实感的美学，结合电影般的暖色调灯光、浓郁的木质色调、地道的书法工具、浅景深、半身构图，营造出严肃且专注的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 照片级真实感的书法学者场景：此提示词可生成一张知名科技人物在传统书房中练习中国书法的写实肖像，适用于社论讽刺、文化混搭或社交媒体对比帖。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, documentary, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
